message:
Expand daemon behavioral tests from 3 to 35

DIAL-73g: Comprehensive daemon behavioral test suite

Added tests organized by category:

Control Mode Tests (3):
- test_control_mode_equality, test_control_mode_debug, test_control_mode_clone

DaemonStats Tests (2):
- test_daemon_stats_default, test_daemon_stats_debug

Daemon Creation Tests (3):
- test_daemon_creation, test_daemon_initial_state, test_daemon_with_custom_config

Running Flag / Shutdown Tests (3):
- test_running_flag_initially_false, test_running_flag_clone
- test_running_flag_shared_across_threads

Mode Switching Tests (5):
- test_switch_mode_to_microphone, test_switch_mode_to_volume
- test_switch_mode_same_mode_no_change, test_switch_mode_multiple_times
- test_switch_mode_resets_rotation_processor

Config Reload Tests (2):
- test_reload_config, test_reload_config_preserves_state

Click Result Processing Tests (5):
- test_process_click_result_single_click_increments_stats
- test_process_click_result_double_click_switches_to_mic
- test_process_click_result_triple_click_increments_stats
- test_process_click_result_triple_click_disabled_media
- test_process_click_result_none_does_nothing

Mic Mode Expiry Tests (3):
- test_mic_mode_starts_with_timestamp, test_mic_mode_expiry_check_in_tick
- test_mic_mode_not_expired_yet

Button State Handling Tests (3):
- test_button_down_state_tracking, test_button_press_triggers_click_detector
- test_repeated_same_state_no_action

Integration-style Tests (4):
- test_full_double_click_sequence, test_triple_click_sequence
- test_daemon_stats_accumulate, test_surface_dial_usb_ids

USB Constants + Accessors Tests (3):
- test_surface_dial_usb_ids, test_control_mode_accessor, test_is_connected_accessor

Total test count: 3 -> 35 (11.7x increase)
Full test suite: 116 -> 143 tests (+27)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
